name: newcomer-first-responder
description: An always-on AI inside sales agent (ISA) suite for Newcomer Group agents. Works both brand-new leads (First Responder) and the existing/older FUB database (nurture, 3x daily) toward booked appointments. Uses the Follow Up Boss API to detect, read, log, set stages, and book; the browser to send value-first texts and run Revii referrals. Covers Fello and HomeLight sources, handles opt-outs responsibly (Do Not Contact + Fishing Pond), self-heals on errors, learns team-wide, and runs on the agent's own Claude.
